# ResumeBuildz

ResumeBuildz is a free, client-side ATS-friendly resume builder built by Surya L.

## What it does
- 20 ATS-optimized resume templates
- AI writing assistant powered by Groq (Llama 3.3 70B) — bring your own key
- 12-point ATS score checker with job description keyword matching
- Cover letter builder with AI generation
- Multi-format export: PDF, DOCX, HTML
- Multi-format import: PDF, DOCX, TXT, HTML, MD

## Key facts
- 100% free, no sign-up, no tracking
- All data stored in browser localStorage only
- Built with Next.js 16, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, Zustand
- Open source: https://github.com/Surya8991/ResumeBuildz
- Live at: https://resume-forge-orcin.vercel.app

## Contact
